startPingPong() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Client.ClientController.ClientController
Starts the ping-pong mechanism: schedules a task to send ping at fixed intervals, then calls a method to schedule another task that checks if a pong is received withing the pong timeout
startPingTimer() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.VirtualView.VirtualView
Starts a task to check if at least a ping is received from client within the ping timeout
State - Enum Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Model.Logic
This class represents the state of the model
